entity.summary: Taiko concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange providing spot token swaps, liquidity pools, fee generation, and active on-chain DEX volume.
entity.notes: The dedicated DTX exchange domain remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies DTX Dex V3 as a Taiko CLMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, and recent DEX volume. HEI models the version-labelled registry row as one DTX DEX entity. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party protocol documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: DTX Exchange official website
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party DTX exchange domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: DTX Dex V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies DTX Dex V3 as a Taiko CLMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, recent DEX volume, and cumulative volume.

evidence.title: DTX DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies DTX Dex V3 on Taiko; HEI consolidates the version-labelled source representation under one DTX DEX entity.
